claims: AC6.1: run() validates the scaffold, creates leader/worker/verifier tmux panes, launches the worker with the requested codex model flags, and writes runtime status for iteration 1 in worker phase.

AC6.2: worker verify signals scope verifier prompts to the completed US, codex signal timeouts fall back to current-US verification, and failed verdicts write a fix contract before retrying the same US.
AC6.3: repeated failures on the same US escalate gpt-5.4 from medium to high to xhigh and block the campaign after the final escalation path is exhausted.
AC6.4: once all per-US verifications pass, the runner re-verifies each US sequentially, runs the integration check, and writes COMPLETE only after every final step succeeds.
AC6.5: an existing BLOCKED sentinel prevents startup and tells the user to run clean first.

execution_steps.summary: Added AC6.1 happy, boundary, and negative tests to tests/node/us006-campaign-main-loop.test.mjs covering tmux startup, real tmux pane creation, and missing-scaffold rejection.
RED: the new US-006 suite failed because src/node/runner/campaign-main-loop.mjs did not exist yet (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND).
Created src/node/runner/campaign-main-loop.mjs with scaffold validation, tmux session/pane setup, worker prompt writing, worker launch command assembly, and runtime status persistence.
GREEN: AC6.1 tmux startup coverage passed (3/3).
Added AC6.2 happy, boundary, and negative tests covering scoped verifier dispatch, codex timeout fallback, and same-US fix-contract retries.
RED evidence reused from the initial US-006 suite run before any runner implementation existed.
Implemented verifier prompt dispatch, current-US codex timeout fallback, verdict handling, and fix-contract generation for retry iterations.
GREEN: AC6.2 verifier-scoping and fix-loop coverage passed (3/3).
Added AC6.3 happy, boundary, and negative tests for model escalation, resume with persisted failure streaks, and blocking after xhigh exhaustion.
RED evidence reused from the initial US-006 suite run before the runner module was created.
Implemented consecutive-failure tracking, codex model upgrade routing, persisted runtime resume fields, and blocked-sentinel writes after exhausting the upgrade path.
GREEN: AC6.3 escalation and blocked-path coverage passed (3/3).
Added AC6.4 happy, boundary, and negative tests for final sequential per-US verification, final regression handling, and integration failure prevention of COMPLETE.
RED evidence reused from the initial US-006 suite run before the final verify implementation existed.
Implemented final sequential verifier dispatch, dedicated final-US prompt artifacts, integration hook execution, and COMPLETE gating on all final checks passing.
GREEN: AC6.4 final sequential verify coverage passed (3/3).
Added AC6.5 happy, boundary, and negative tests for blocked-sentinel startup rejection, tmux/status short-circuiting, and normal startup without a blocked sentinel.
RED evidence reused from the initial US-006 suite run before the startup guard was implemented.
Implemented blocked-sentinel startup refusal with a clean-first error before any tmux session or status mutation occurs.
GREEN: AC6.5 blocked-start guard coverage passed (3/3).

execution_steps.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "US-006 AC6.1 happy|US-006 AC6.2 happy|US-006 AC6.3 happy|US-006 AC6.4 happy|US-006 AC6.5 negative" tests/node/us006-campaign-main-loop.test.mjs
execution_steps.summary: Happy-path subset passed (5/5), including tmux bootstrap, verifier scoping, escalation, final sequential verify, and normal startup.
